title: Wrathmaw
wikitext:
{{Failed poll|Summer Summit 2024 - Summary}}
[[File:Wrathmaw- the Wilderness World Boss - Summer Summit 2024 (1).png|thumb|300px|Early concepts for the Wrathmaw, the part-tree, part-wyrm world boss.]]
'''Wrathmaw''' was a proposed PVP world boss announced at the [[Summer Summit 2024]]. It was originally part of a [[Game Jam II#Wilderness Expansion Revisited|Game Jam project by Mod Soffan]].

A [[Poll:Summer Summit 2024 - Summary|poll]] was released during the Summer Summit regarding Wrathmaw. If passed, the rewards would have been discussed on a further date.

The poll failed, with 55,972 players (49.1%) voting in favour of its release, 58,080 players voting against (50.9%) and 7,545 players deciding to skip the question, failing to pass the 70% threshold required.

Some of the criticisms of the proposal were:

*While proposed as a World Boss, it was exclusively limited to the Wilderness.
*Unlike other bosses, Wrathmaw would be limited to three worlds, with an eight hour gap between spawns. The long gap between spawns caused player concern about [[wikipedia:Fear_of_missing_out|fear of missing out]] and [[player killing]] clans potentially locking down zones, especially in [[multicombat area]]s.
*The boss' unique drop, Wrathmaw's Teeth, were rewarded in extremely low numbers. Each spawn would drop a total of 220 teeth divided amongst the top 60 damage-dealing players, with 20 going to the MvP. These teeth could either be traded for [[revenant ether]] or used to amplify popular finisher weapons, such as the [[armadyl godsword]] and [[dark bow]], or side equipment such tomes and shields. 1,000 of these teeth would be required for a single weapon, compared to 20 for a tome or shield. With an 8-hour gap between spawns, the amount of amplified weapons entering the game would be extremely scarce.
*The boss would automatically apply a [[Tele Block]] as a mechanic to all combatants, which made it less favourable to kill in any location.

On [[19 September]] [[2024]], Jagex proposed multiple changes to Wrathmaw on a Twitch stream,{{CiteVideo|author=OldSchoolRS|title=Join us for a Q&A on Wrathmaw!|url=https://www.twitch.tv/videos/2255075419?t=00h45m54s|timestamp=45:54|date19 September 2024|site=Twitch.tv}} including, but not limited to:{{CiteReddit|author=IgnusTeras|url=https://www.reddit.com/r/2007scape/comments/1fkpyrj/|title=Wrathmaw (and Sandmaw) proposed changes tl;dr|date=19 September 2024|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/zNHVc|archivedate=16 November 2024}}
* Adding a desert version of the boss called Sandmaw
** Sandmaw would have a much higher spawn rate (respawning every 1-3 minutes after dying) and would drop an amulet equivalent to an amulet of fury that reduces damage from players near Sandmaw or Wrathmaw
* Drastically increasing the spawn rate of Wrathmaw and amout of teeth gained
* Adding a small delay between Wrathmaw spawns, allowing players to finish up any fights or resupply for the next one
* Making one world exclusively have Wrathmaw spawn in multi-combat zones while all other worlds would have Wrathmaw spawn in single-combat zones
* Making all rewards and amplified items only usable in PvP scenarios

As of [[Update:PvP Survey, Wrathmaw, Bounty Hunter Changes & More!|5 November 2024]], Wrathmaw and Sandmaw have been shelved.
